array.string: export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin"; cd /Users/ellingrov/amazon-job-radar-runner; set -a; source /Users/ellingrov/amazon-job-radar-runner/.env.local; set +a; echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Starting Amazon job check" >> /Users/ellingrov/amazon-job-radar-runner/output/local-runner/amazon-job-radar.log; npm run check >> /Users/ellingrov/amazon-job-radar-runner/output/local-runner/amazon-job-radar.log 2>&1; echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Amazon job check completed" >> /Users/ellingrov/amazon-job-radar-runner/output/local-runner/amazon-job-radar.log
